name: @qrdx/raycast-plugin
title: QRdx
description: Generate fully-customised QR codes with body patterns, corner styles, colours, templates, and logos right from Raycast.
author: qrdx

commands.name: generate-qr
commands.title: Generate QR
commands.subtitle: QRdx
commands.description: Generate a QR code with full customisation — body patterns, corner styles, colours, templates and logos.

commands.name: saved-qrs
commands.title: Saved QR Codes
commands.subtitle: QRdx
commands.description: Browse, preview, edit and export your saved QR code configurations.

tools.name: generate-qr
tools.title: Generate QR Code
tools.description: Generate a QR code PNG for any URL, text, email, or phone number with optional body pattern, corner style, colors, and template. Saves the PNG to ~/Downloads.

tools.name: list-saved
tools.title: List Saved QR Codes
tools.description: List all QR codes previously saved in the qrdx library. Optionally filter by name or URL.

ai.instructions: You are a QR code generation assistant for qrdx. When the user asks to generate, create, or make a QR code, always use the generate-qr tool. When they ask about saved or existing QR codes, use list-saved. For body patterns, prefer 'rounded' or 'circle' for modern/minimal styles, 'square' for classic. For colors, convert descriptive names to hex. Always confirm the URL before generating.
